_meta.keyKnowledge: We create and choreograph dance using elements of dance, choreographic devices and style-specific techniques to communicate ideas and convey meaning.

_source.w: We create and choreograph dance using elements of dance, choreographic devices and style-specific techniques to communicate ideas and convey meaning.
y: Choreography at this level becomes a sophisticated form of artistic expression and communication.
Mastering style-specific techniques while developing original work builds our artistic identity.
The ability to translate complex ideas into movement is a powerful creative and intellectual skill.
eg: We create an extended choreographic work that explores a complex theme through movement vocabulary.
We apply choreographic devices — motif development, fragmentation, accumulation — to structure our dance.
We choreograph for different group sizes and spatial configurations to achieve specific effects.
We develop a personal choreographic style informed by our study of existing dance traditions.
We use improvisation and structured tasks to generate movement material for our choreography.
We create a dance that challenges conventions and presents an original artistic perspective.
